title: centaurea koeieana subsp. koeieana
intro: Centaurea koeieana subsp. koeieana, also known as Koeie's knapweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Centaurea koeieana subsp. koeieana is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal herb.
